blockingIssues.description: WebGL failure fallback is not static: `AsciiBackground` only stops animating for reduced motion, so the shipped fallback still shows moving ASCII instead of the coherent static presentation required by the feature contract.

The integrated fallback state still animates ASCII layers while `HeroVisualSystem` reports `data-visual-state="fallback"` and `data-motion-layers=0`, so the fallback metadata and enhanced-vs-fallback differentiation contract are inaccurate.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/user-testing.md` to document that the current `agent-browser` CLI uses `open` rather than `launch` for URL sessions.
Updated `.factory/library/user-testing.md` to require separate validation of immersive `fallback` and `reduced-motion` states when both exist.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten `frontend-experience-worker` procedure evidence so hero/immersive features that mark `followedProcedure=true` must either show transcript evidence of `.factory/research/screenshots/` review or explicitly declare an exception path for non-visual-only fixes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for `visual-source-overhaul-radiant-asset-background` found no screenshot-review evidence despite the skill requiring screenshot review for hero/immersive work, and the same adherence gap was already recorded in `.factory/validation/landing-redesign/scrutiny/synthesis.json` round 2.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit handoff field or checklist item for at least one newly failing pre-implementation test expectation whenever `frontend-experience-worker` claims test-first adherence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews for `visual-source-overhaul-radiant-asset-background` and `visual-source-overhaul-layered-motion-and-fallback-differentiation` both found transcript evidence of test-first work, but the handoffs still omitted the concrete failing-test citation required by the skill while marking `followedProcedure=true`.

rejectedObservations.observation: The current visual fallback tests expect ASCII motion to persist during WebGL fallback.
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a feature-specific product/test defect already captured in the blocking review findings, not a separate shared-state update to apply in `services.yaml`, `.factory/library/`, or orchestrator guidance.
